_note: First-party Aleph MCP servers, hand-curated, trust_tier=official, via=aleph-official (same provenance badge as Aleph-skills / Aleph-plugins). Sourced from github.com/rootazero/Aleph-mcp — Aleph's official MCP repo that fills gaps where vendors ship no official MCP. Projected by scripts/pipeline/mcp-presets.ts (loadAlephMcp), bypassing source discovery. Each entry links to its real upstream subdir. CROSS-REPO ID CONTRACT (P-Provenance): `id` MUST be `aleph-hub:<catalog.json id>` (the Aleph preset slug, e.g. aleph-hub:siliconflow) — NOT `aleph-hub:<full_name>`. Aleph's primer projects each preset to `aleph-hub:<id>` and reconciles installed-state by that id; a divergent id silently breaks the primer→remote 'installed' handoff. `full_name`/`repo_url` keep the real upstream subdir for provenance.

entries.name: SiliconFlow 媒体生成
entries.author: rootazero

env.name: SILICONFLOW_API_BASE
env.description: 可选：覆盖区域端点（默认 https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1；海外用 .com）

env.name: SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR
env.description: 可选：本地保存生成的图片/视频目录（否则仅返回临时 URL）

env.name: SILICONFLOW_AUDIO_DIR
env.description: 可选：音频保存目录（默认同 SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR）

entries.description_en: Aleph's official SiliconFlow media-generation MCP — image / video / TTS over an npx stdio process.
entries.description_zh: Aleph 官方 SiliconFlow 媒体生成 MCP — 经 npx stdio 暴露图像 / 视频 / 语音合成。
entries.long_en: First-party MCP built by Aleph (TypeScript rewrite, verified against SiliconFlow's official docs). Exposes generate_image / edit_image / generate_video / submit_video_generation / get_video_status / generate_speech / list_models / get_user_info via an npx-spawned Node process.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 自建的一方 MCP（TypeScript 重写，对照 SiliconFlow 官方文档核验）。经 npx 拉起的 Node 子进程暴露 generate_image / edit_image / generate_video / submit_video_generation / get_video_status / generate_speech / list_models / get_user_info 等工具。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs a SILICONFLOW_API_KEY; runs an npx-spawned Node process and calls SiliconFlow's paid media APIs. Generated media URLs expire quickly — set SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR to persist assets.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需 SILICONFLOW_API_KEY；经 npx 拉起 Node 子进程，调用 SiliconFlow 付费媒体 API。生成的媒体 URL 很快过期 —— 设置 SILICONFLOW_IMAGE_DIR 可本地留存。

entries.name: T8star 中转
entries.author: rootazero

env.name: T8STAR_API_BASE
env.description: 可选：覆盖区域端点（默认 https://ai.t8star.org/v1；可改 .cn 镜像）

env.name: T8STAR_IMAGE_DIR
env.description: 可选：本地保存生成的图片目录（否则仅返回临时 URL；部分模型返回 base64 需落盘）

env.name: T8STAR_AUDIO_DIR
env.description: 可选：音频保存目录（默认同 T8STAR_IMAGE_DIR）

entries.description_en: Aleph's official T8star media-generation MCP — image / TTS over an npx stdio process against the T8star model relay.
entries.description_zh: Aleph 官方 T8star 媒体生成 MCP — 经 npx stdio 暴露图像 / 语音合成，对接 T8star 中转。
entries.long_en: First-party MCP built by Aleph for T8star (ai.t8star.org), an OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible model relay. Exposes media-generation tools only — generate_image / edit_image / generate_speech / list_models / get_balance — via an npx-spawned Node process. Chat models go through Aleph's Provider system, not this MCP. Video / Midjourney / Suno are planned follow-ups.
entries.long_zh: Aleph 为 T8star（ai.t8star.org，OpenAI/Anthropic 兼容的模型中转）自建的一方 MCP。仅暴露媒体生成工具 —— generate_image / edit_image / generate_speech / list_models / get_balance —— 经 npx 拉起的 Node 子进程。对话模型走 Aleph 的 Provider 系统，不经此 MCP。视频 / Midjourney / Suno 为后续迭代。
entries.sec_note_en: Needs a T8STAR_API_KEY; runs an npx-spawned Node process and calls T8star's paid media APIs. Generated image URLs expire (some models return base64 that must be saved) — set T8STAR_IMAGE_DIR to persist assets.
entries.sec_note_zh: 需 T8STAR_API_KEY；经 npx 拉起 Node 子进程，调用 T8star 付费媒体 API。生成的图片 URL 会过期（部分模型返回 base64 需落盘）—— 设置 T8STAR_IMAGE_DIR 可本地留存。
